title: Raccoon Removal in Ardsley, NY | $900-$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Ardsley, Westchester. Licensed experts handle raccoon trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Ardsley residents facing raccoon intrusions need swift, humane removal services to protect their homes and families. Our expert raccoon removal team serves the entire Ardsley area, from the historic homes near the Saw Mill River to modern properties throughout this Westchester village. We provide comprehensive raccoon trapping, exclusion, and damage repair with pricing typically ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on infestation severity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife management experience to Ardsley, with certified technicians who understand the unique challenges of Westchester County properties. We offer same-day emergency response, humane removal practices, and guaranteed exclusion work to ensure raccoons don't return to your attic, chimney, or crawl spaces.
localContext: Ardsley's tree-lined streets, proximity to wooded areas along the Saw Mill River Parkway, and mix of historic Victorian homes and contemporary residences create ideal conditions for raccoon activity. Properties near Pascone Park and the Ardsley Country Club frequently experience raccoon problems, especially during spring nesting season when mothers seek shelter in attics and chimneys.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Ardsley typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and extent of damage repair needed. A basic single raccoon removal starts around $900, while complex cases involving multiple animals, extensive attic damage, or difficult access points can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Ardsley, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Ardsley due to the village's abundant tree coverage, proximity to the Saw Mill River and wooded areas, and mix of older homes with accessible entry points. Raccoons are particularly active in spring when females seek attics and chimneys for nesting, and in fall when they search for warm winter shelter. The residential areas near Pascone Park and along wooded streets see frequent raccoon activity.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Ardsley home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service for Ardsley residents dealing with raccoon emergencies. Initial trapping can often begin within 24 hours of your call. Complete removal typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of raccoons and whether babies are present. We never separate mothers from dependent young and follow all New York State wildlife regulations for humane removal.

faqs.question: Do you repair damage caused by raccoons in Ardsley homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complete raccoon damage restoration services including insulation replacement, attic decontamination, wood repair, and sealing of all entry points. Raccoons can cause significant damage to soffits, roof vents, fascia boards, and insulation in Ardsley's older homes. Our team will assess all damage during the inspection, remove contaminated materials, sanitize affected areas, and perform necessary repairs to restore your home and prevent future intrusions.
